content:
## AIonopedia: LLM Agent for Ionic Liquid Discovery

Orchestrate LLM agents for scientific discovery, combining multimodal learning to accelerate research in chemistry and materials science.

### Core Concept

Multi-agent framework for domain-specific scientific reasoning

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11257

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When applying agents to scientific discovery domains
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: AIonopedia: an LLM agent orchestrating multimodal learning for ionic liquid discovery
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11257
